deterministic.engagement_rationale: 10 signals in the last 14 days from 6 contacts.

llm_produced.narrative: Engagement is high, with 10 signals over the past 14 days from multiple contacts spanning product usage, renewal conversations, and competitive evaluation threads. Sentiment is mixed: on one hand, Alex Johnson proactively reached out on 2026-05-01 ('Re: compliance requirements') to get ahead of an upcoming renewal, Riley Smith requested a review call on 2026-04-28 ('User provisioning') for a Q3 renewal, and Skylar Garcia confirmed active data migration renewal discussions on 2026-04-25 ('Re: data migration'). On the other hand, two signals introduce competitive pressure — an 'Upgrade timeline' email on 2026-04-28 citing claims of 3x faster data sync and a 'Re: SSO configuration' email on 2026-04-26 requesting a competitive review meeting with pricing from several alternative providers. Product usage is concentrated entirely on Blake Brown, who performed multiple actions (file uploads, a comment, an export) across features including audit_log, saved_views, workflows, shareable_links, and dashboards, but no other contacts show any product activity, indicating narrow adoption.
